Fix Monaco race condition: delay Blazor start until Monaco loaded

BlazorMonaco silently fails (console error, no retry) if the monaco
global isn't available when it tries to create editors. On hard refresh,
the AMD require for vs/editor/editor.main may not complete before
Blazor renders the StandaloneCodeEditor components.

Fix: use autostart=false on blazor.webassembly.js and gate Blazor.start()
on a monacoReady promise that resolves when the AMD require completes.
The require() call is issued before jsInterop.js loads (which clobbers
the AMD require with a plain config object).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat(season_adder): syoboi詳細取得によるshort_name/official_url優先ロジック追加

- _normalize_for_short_name(): 英語タイトルをCamelCase化するヘルパーを追加
- fetch_syoboi_details(): しょぼいカレンダー個別TID詳細取得関数を追加
  - XMLのCommentフィールドをparseしてx_handle / official_urlを抽出
  - API呼び出し後にtime.sleep(0.5)でサーバー負荷軽減
  - _SYOBOI_DETAIL_URL 定数を追加
- メインループの処理順を最適化:
  1. jikan抽出をsyoboi_tid取得の前に移動（title_english参照のため）
  2. syoboi_tidが存在する場合のみfetch_syoboi_detailsを呼び出す
- short_name決定ロジック（3段階優先）:
  1. syoboi_details["x_handle"] → アンダースコア保持・小文字化
  2. jikan["title_english"] → CamelCase正規化
  3. str(mal_id) → フォールバック
- anime_id生成をgenerate_anime_id()からf-string直接構築に変更
  （アンダースコア保持・ハッシュフォールバック維持）
- official_url決定: syoboi_details優先 → Jikan URLへフォールバック

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: add daily target scores, fix light mode, update helm & workflows

- Add Daily Target vs Actual section to dashboard with health score
  targets and daily goal progress tracking
- Fix score readability in light mode by using darker color variants
  (text-emerald-700, text-amber-700, etc.) with dark mode fallbacks
- Replace helm chart with mature v0.3.0 from helm-for-home including
  PostgreSQL, Redis deployments, Traefik IngressRoute, PVC support
- Add cleanup.yml workflow for container image & stale issue management
- Add label.yml workflow with labeler.yml config for auto PR labeling
- Add security.yml workflow with pnpm audit, Trivy, and CodeQL scanning

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

- Merge src-admin dependencies into root package.json
- Remove src-admin/package.json and package-lock.json

- Fix @types/react-dom version mismatch (was ^19.2.3, now ^18.3.7)
- Remove @types/cron (cron v4 has built-in types)
- Update @iobroker/adapter-react-v5 to ^8.1.4

- Update vite to ^6.4.1, @vitejs/plugin-react to ^4.7.0
- Align TypeScript to ~5.9.3
- Rewrite tasks.js to call vite directly (no more npmInstall in src-admin)

* chore: commit admin GUI build and remove from prepare script

The admin UI build output is now committed to the repo so end users
don't need to build it (and install all admin devDependencies) during
npm install. The prepare script now only runs the TypeScript build.

Add cold-chain deviation closure spot-check sampling-rate tuning instance
grounded in regulated distribution quality operations. The example is
materially distinct from the existing maintenance-documentation instance:
it covers closure-packet spot-check coverage policy for temperature
excursion and transport deviation artifacts rather than work-order records.

fix: improve Phi3 question follow-up logic and detect incoherent answers

- Add incoherence detection to skip follow-ups for nonsensical answers
- Detect markers like multiple question marks, 'I don't know', rambling patterns
- Enhance decision prompt to explicitly handle incoherent responses
- Update follow-up prompt to recognize and skip generation for broken answers
- Add 'SKIP_FOLLOWUP' signal support for Phi3 to opt-out
- Improve fallback logic to prioritize coherence over answer length
- Remove unused useEffect import from MyApplicationsPage
- Add ESLint disable comments for type safety

Fixes issue where follow-up questions were generated for nonsensical answers, breaking interview flow.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: mechanism-based visual tool enforcement in agentic loop

If the AI responds with text-only and no tool calls on the first round,
automatically re-prompt asking it to use a visual tool. This replaces
hope-based prompt enforcement with a programmatic mechanism.

Inspired by TW93's agent design article: constraints by mechanism, not hope.

B2: Apply quick-win balance optimizations across 5 config files (#47)

Conservative manual balance pass over externalized JSON configs:

- Woodcutting patterns: Fix difficulty-to-reward monotonicity (e.g.,
  Perfect Straight 3.0x→15.0x, Four of a Kind 10.0x→3.5x, reduce
  Eight of a Kind from 55.0x→30.0x, increase straights/sets)
- Crafting durability: Reduce grant 500→300 (10:1→6:1 ratio)
- Scouting: Rebalance asymmetry from (-15%,+30%) to (-20%,+25%)
- Mining: Narrow stamina cost from (50,350) to (80,200)
- Rest: Reduce overpowered recovery (health_cost_stamina 900-1200→500-700,
  stamina_cost_health 600-800→400-550)
- Combat: Reduce health_start_damage from (1000,1300) to (700,950)
- Milestone fishing: Widen valid_range from (-50,+50) to (-80,+100)

Test updates: 4 durability grant assertions updated (500→300).
All 146 tests pass. Coverage 82.37%→83.16%.

Co-authored-by: RobbingDaHood <robbingdahood@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

docs(agent): scope hr obligations synthesis iteration

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: prevent CopilotProvider.Close() from acting on never-started client

Add 'started' flag to CopilotProvider so Close() only calls client.Stop()
when ensureStarted() has actually been called. Previously, startErr's nil
zero-value made Close() assume startup succeeded even when Start() was
never invoked — a correctness bug that could break with future SDK changes.

Also add COPILOT_CLI_PATH test safeguard to root_ai_test.go tests to
prevent accidental SDK process spawning during test execution.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: gitinfo enhancements, contributor recognition, and deadcode cleanup (#35)

* fix: use display width for tab click zones (#31)

* feat: add contributor recognition to release pipeline (#30)

* feat: open repo in browser on header double-click (#33)

* feat: color PRs by mergeable state and show action status icon (#32)

* chore: remove stale deadcode allowlist entries (#21)

Remove 3 allowlist entries for functions that are now reachable:
- SanitizeCommitMessage (called from provider_copilot.go)
- stripControlCharsPreserveNewlines (called via SanitizeCommitMessage)
- ShowActionPickerWithMessage (called from gitinfo.go)

All 131 remaining deadcode findings are legitimate false positives
(interface impls, factory-dispatched runtimes, build-tag stubs,
test accessors) and remain correctly allowlisted.

* fix: apply gofmt formatting to pass CI

* fix: resolve golangci-lint findings in contributor and gitinfo code

- goconst: extract crossMark constant for '✗' string (3 occurrences)
- noctx: use exec.CommandContext in defaultGitRunner, thread context.Context through gitRunner type
- staticcheck S1007: use raw string literal for coAuthorRegex
- staticcheck QF1012: replace b.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(...)) with fmt.Fprintf(&b, ...) in format.go

* fix: sync CI deadcode check with local allowlist-filtered mage target

feat: upgrade glamour to v2 (charm.land/glamour/v2) (#38)

Migrate the last remaining Charm v1 dependency from
github.com/charmbracelet/glamour v1.0.0 to charm.land/glamour/v2 v2.0.0.

This completes grut's full Charm ecosystem v2 migration:
- bubbletea v2.0.2 (charm.land/bubbletea/v2)
- bubbles v2.0.0 (charm.land/bubbles/v2)
- lipgloss v2.0.2 (charm.land/lipgloss/v2)
- glamour v2.0.0 (charm.land/glamour/v2)

Also eliminates the transitive v1 lipgloss indirect dependency
that was pulled in by glamour v1.

Closes #37

commit.message:
feat: movie pagination, root folders, backup UI, CRUD modals for indexers/clients/notifications

Frontend:
- Movies: server-side pagination (page/pageSize, X-Total-Count header, ChevronLeft/Right nav)
- Settings: Root Folders tab — list/add/delete with free space display
- Settings: Backup tab — create/download/restore/delete backups
- Settings: Indexers/Clients/Notifications tabs get Add/Edit/Delete CRUD modals
  - CrudModal with implementation dropdown (from schema endpoint) + JSON fields editor
  - Notifications: per-row Test button + Test All button
- Fix tests: Movies mock adds headers for X-Total-Count; Settings schema test opens modal;
  notifications test checks implementation name not configContract

All 51 frontend tests pass, build clean.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
